title: Visual Validation and Accessibility Verification
description: Perform final visual validation of the redesigned panel UI. Verify all CSS variables are correctly applied, check 4.5:1 contrast ratios for text elements, ensure smooth transitions (150-300ms), and confirm all element IDs and event listeners are preserved. Document any issues found.

criteria: All 5 $ bindings preserved in $ object: statusCard, statusIcon, statusText, statusDetail, targetPath, browseBtn, coreVersion, installedVersion, availableVersion, installBtn, updateBtn, reinstallBtn, uninstallBtn, progressContainer, progressFill, progressText, logContainer
All 5 confirm event listeners preserved via addEventListener in _bindEvents method
No JavaScript errors in panel initialization
Visual consistency across all states (installed, not-installed, update-available, error)
convergence.definition_of_done: Panel UI redesign complete with verified accessibility and preserved functionality

files.change: Final adjustments and verification comments if needed

implementation.title: Verify element IDs preserved
implementation.description: Confirm all HTML element IDs are intact
modification_points: Check 17 element IDs exist in template property
logic_flow: Extract all id='...' attributes from template

implementation.title: Verify event listeners preserved
implementation.description: Confirm all addEventListener calls and $ bindings are intact
modification_points: Check 5 confirm event listeners in _bindEvents method using addEventListener
Verify 17 $ object bindings match element IDs
Verify IPC message handlers in messages object
logic_flow: Verify each button has confirm listener

implementation.title: Accessibility and transition verification
implementation.description: Verify contrast ratios and transition timing
logic_flow: Calculate contrast ratios for key color pairs
Verify all transitions are within 150-300ms range

implementation.title: Document final state
modification_points: Record design decisions in N+1 Context section

pre_analysis.action: Extract all element IDs from template

context: Complete CSS variable migration with zero hardcoded values

rationale.final_verification: Ensures redesign meets all quality and accessibility requirements

risks: Manual visual inspection required in Cocos Creator

commands.run_tests: Manual: Open panel in Cocos Creator 2.x and verify visual appearance
